return(function(U,J,p,h,e,l,D,d,j,R,I,H,Y,s,v,S,T,V,g,f,M,k,q)g,M,R,Y,T,v,f,j,s,d,q,k,I,S,H,V=function(U,K)local J=V(K)local p=function(p,h,e,l,D,R)return d(U,{p;h;e;l;D,R},K,J)end return p end,function(U)local K,d=-697549-(-697550),U[-334850-(-334851)]while d do H[d],K=H[d]-(1015724+-1015723),K+(-218384+218385)if H[d]==-928348-(-928348)then H[d],R[d]=nil,nil end d=U[K]end
